name: e2e-parallel-aggregate
description: Parallel aggregate task receives completed and failed task status/output context.

tasks.task: Reply exactly AGGREGATE_SOURCE_OK and do not inspect or modify files.
This task should fail before child Pi starts because the cwd is missing.

aggregate.task: If the Parallel Aggregate Context lists aggregate-source-ok with status completed, aggregate-source-fail with status failed, and includes AGGREGATE_SOURCE_OK in an output preview, reply exactly E2E_AGGREGATE_OK. Otherwise reply exactly E2E_AGGREGATE_MISSING. Do not inspect or modify files.
